title: Axolotl Totem (Lucy)
description: Axolotl totem for 1.21.11 first ever resource pack let me know what y'all think
body:
# **🌸 Axolotl Totem Pack**

Bring your Totem of Undying to life with a cute yet legendary Axolotl redesign, made to stand out with high-quality textures, smooth animation support, and a vibrant fantasy aesthetic.

![Axolotl ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da3cb679d003fc90e52d2c3cbec2ad5782b908f5_0.webp)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


</details>



---

# ✨ Features
- Custom Axolotl Totem of Undying

- Animated texture support

- Bright fantasy-inspired colors

- Designed for high visual quality

- Lightweight and performance friendly

- Made for Minecraft 1.21.1

- Compatible with Hold My Items (HMI)

---

# ⚠ Requirements

- The Hold My Items (HMI) mod is required for the animation to work

- Without HMI, the totem will still appear, but the animation will not work

- The resource pack must be placed at the top of your enabled resource packs

- Recommended for best compatibility with Minecraft 1.21.1

---

# 📥 Installation

- Download the resource pack

- Place it in your resourcepacks folder

- Move the pack to the top of your resource pack list

- Install Hold My Items (HMI)
  
- Launch Minecraft 1.21.1
  
- Enjoy your animated Axolotl Totem

---

# 👀 Preview

This pack transforms the standard Totem of Undying into a glowing animated Axolotl Totem, giving your gameplay a fresh and unique style.

---

# ❤️ Credits

Axolotl bucket model by Team Disco (used with permission)

---

# **👑 Creator**
Created by Kortez
If you enjoy this pack, consider supporting the project and sharing it with others.
